SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.core.exception

Record Class MethodExceptionContext<T>

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.societegenerale.failover.core.exception.MethodExceptionContext<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the return type of the intercepted method
Record Components:
failover - the Failover annotation from the intercepted method
method - the intercepted method that threw the exception
args - the arguments passed to the method at the call site
recoveredResult - the value recovered from the failover store, or null if recovery produced no result (store miss, expiry, or store failure)
cause - the original exception thrown by the primary method call
public record MethodExceptionContext<T>(Failover failover, Method method, List<Object> args, @Nullable T recoveredResult, Throwable cause) extends Record
Carries all contextual information available at the point where a method exception is handled.

An instance is constructed by BasicFailoverExecution after the primary method call fails and the failover recovery has been attempted. It is passed to the active MethodExceptionPolicy to decide the final outcome.

Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Constructor Details

    • MethodExceptionContext

      public MethodExceptionContext(Failover failover, Method method, List<Object> args, @Nullable T recoveredResult, Throwable cause)
      Creates an instance of a MethodExceptionContext record class.
      Parameters:
      failover - the value for the failover record component
      method - the value for the method record component
      args - the value for the args record component
      recoveredResult - the value for the recoveredResult record component
      cause - the value for the cause record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • failover

      public Failover failover()
      Returns the value of the failover record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the failover record component

      public Method method()
      Returns the value of the method record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the method record component

    • args

      Returns:

    • recoveredResult

      public @Nullable T recoveredResult()
      Returns the value of the recoveredResult record component.
      Returns:

    • cause

      Returns the value of the cause record component.
      Returns:
